allow:
Bash(git commit -m "fix: Remove inline styles and improve mobile menu accessibility

Mobile Menu Background:
- Removed all inline backgroundColor styles
- Now uses Tailwind bg-slate-950 class
- Responds to theme changes properly
- Cleaner code without mixed styling approaches

Accessibility Improvements:
- aria-label now indicates open/closed state
- Added aria-expanded attribute
- Button properly announces state to screen readers
- Better keyboard navigation support

Addresses PR review issues #7 and #6.")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: Add error boundary and disable incomplete GitLab auth

Error Boundary:
- Created ErrorBoundary component for graceful error handling
- Wraps profile page content
- Shows friendly error message with retry/home options
- Logs errors for debugging
- Prevents blank page on component errors

GitLab Warning:
- Disabled GitLab sign-in button
- Added ""Coming Soon"" badge
- Set opacity-50 to indicate disabled state
- Prevents users from using non-functional auth
- Ready to enable when GitLab provider is implemented

This addresses PR review critical issues #1 and #5.")

Bash(git commit -m "refactor: Extract UserAvatar component to reduce duplication

Created UserAvatar component:
- Reusable avatar with image or initial fallback
- Configurable size, border, and link
- Proper image optimization with sizes attribute
- Consistent styling across all uses

Replaced avatar code in:
- Header (desktop profile icon)
- Profile layout (sidebar card)
- Mobile menu uses existing implementation

Benefits:
- Reduces code duplication (Issue #12)
- Easier to maintain and update
- Consistent avatar rendering
- Better type safety

Addresses PR review issue about duplicate avatar logic.")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: Use proper TypeScript type for ErrorBoundary

- Changed any to React.ErrorInfo for errorInfo parameter
- Fixes TypeScript linting error
- Properly typed error boundary implementation")
Bash(printf 'RF20260224-LAUNCH' | npx vercel env add BYPASS_AUTH_TOKEN production --force 2>&1)
